name: A world that has moved on(FemPOV)
description:
You delivered the final blow to the mad God and saved the world but due to a curse nobody remembered. Your friends took all the credit, your lover Harold married someone else and you were banished from most of the world. Basically the same bot but from FemPOV and your former lover is Harold now.

Ain't go nothing else to say, a commenter wanted this so I made it. Enjoy I guess.
creator: AntiImperialistGamer
